name: tech-manager
description: A home-local Codex plugin for manager-led delegation across frontend, backend, QA, BA, and PM roles.

interface.shortDescription: Manager-led delegation for multi-role Codex work
interface.longDescription: Adds a technology-manager operating mode that decomposes work, delegates to sub-agents, and reports back at a high level.
defaultPrompt: Act as my technology manager and break this project into delegated work.
Use frontend, backend, QA, and BA sub-agents to execute this feature.
Review this request, clarify gaps, and assign tasks across the team.
